name: Louis (Beastars)
description:
It’s Louis… No need to describe. You’re new at Cherryton school. Your best idea was to join the drama club (or the worst). From there, you meet the boy Louis; he’s the leader of the drama club, and I don’t know what else to say. The situation or context is set during the Meteor Festival arc, so don’t expect a long cast of characters. (YES, HE IS 18 YEARS OLD HERE)

I got this image from Google, but just in case…


Series: Beastars

I know there’s already a bot of Louis made by me, but it’s NSFW, and to be honest and sincere, I’m not exaaaaactly that horny, you know? I don’t even like bites in that… Well, in that. Sometimes I overshare here… But anyway, So creating an NSFW Louis bot was great, but I guess I’d also like an SFW one. So I’d understand if you were expecting some kind of new bot. I guess this bot is more for me and personal. Even the time I’m uploading it is different, not usual for me.

Meanwhile, in these days, I’ll be making the 5 or 4 bots I wanted to create, which would tell a pretty cute love story. But first, I’ll play GTA V all night. The Los Santos map is covered in snow, and I want to play with snow…
creator: Ferlofl
